nasb.text: So Saul returned from pursuing David and went to meet the Philistines; therefore they called that place the Rock of Escape.

esv.text: So Saul returned from pursuing after David and went against the Philistines. Therefore that place was called the Rock of Escape.

cnv.text: 於是掃羅不再追趕大衛，回去迎戰非利士人。因此這地方被稱為西拉．哈瑪希羅結。

ccb.text: 扫罗只好放弃追赶大卫，回师迎战非利士人。因此，那地方叫“脱险岩”。
